# ITLibrary

**Class**

This class serves as the entry point to the iTunesLibrary framework.

## Declaration

```swift
class ITLibrary
```

## Overview

Use the [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibrary] properties and methods to retrieve media items (tracks) and playlists from the user’s iTunes library. [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibrary] also provides methods for extracting artwork from a media file that may or may not be in the iTunes library. Sandboxed and nonsandboxed apps can also use iTunes’ ability to extract artwork.



## Essentials

- **init(apiVersion:)**: Initializes an instance of [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibrary] that can retrieve media entities.
- **init(apiVersion:options:)**: Initializes an instance of `ITLibrary` that can retrieve media entities.
- **ITLibInitOptions**: These constants describe initialization options for an iTunes library.

## Getting iTunes Library Info

- **allMediaItems**: All the media items (tracks) in the iTunes library.
- **allPlaylists**: All the playlists in the iTunes library.
- **apiMajorVersion**: The major version number of the API the iTunesLibrary framework exposes.
- **apiMinorVersion**: The minor version number of the API the iTunesLibrary framework exposes.
- **applicationVersion**: The version of iTunes that created or modified the iTunes library you’re accessing.
- **mediaFolderLocation**: The location of the iTunes music folder.
- **shouldShowContentRating**: A Boolean value indicating whether to show content rating labels.

## Loading and Unloading Data

- **reloadData()**: Refreshes the data that the framework uses.
- **unloadData()**: Unloads the data that the framework uses.

## Accessing Artwork

- **artwork(forMediaFile:)**: Retrieves the artwork from a media file that may or may not be in the iTunes library.

## Deprecated

- **features**: A bitwise OR combination of the features of this library.
- **ITLibExportFeature**: These constants describe the features that an iTunes library supports.
- **musicFolderLocation**: The location of the iTunes music folder.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
